roa.docketEntryComment: DEF - Exhibits In Support of Motions for Dismissal Pursuant to Penal Code Section 1203.4 and 1023.4a
DEF - Petition for Dismissal PC 1203.4 CONV DATE: 05-07-2015
PET & ORDER TO SUSP FEE PER SFBOS 180132 SIGNED AND FILED
FELONY CHANGE OF PLEA TX FILED

/CAL:SENTENCING/X:THE COURT MODIFIES THE PROPOSED DISPOSITION AS INDICATEDON THE RECORD,/X:THE DEFENDANT IS ADMONISHED AND ACCEPTS THE PROPOSED MODIFICATION,/X:THE SENTENCE ON ALL COUNTS ARE THE SAME AND CONCURRENT/AJW/DNACOMP/CH1:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ 113D/CTS:113/IND/X:THE DEFENDANT SHALL COMPLETE1 YEAR OF RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT AT THE OHLHOFF CENTER,/X:THE COURT ORDERSTHE DEFENDANT TO ENROLL AND COMPLETE AN 18 MONTH MULTIPLE OFFENDER'S DRUNKDRIVING PROGRAM,/LVAL/LCHEM/WS/X:THE DEFENDANT SHALL PAY A BASE FINE OF$595 PLUS $1859 IN ASSESSMENTS FOR A FINE AMOUNT OF $2454,/X:DEFENDANT SHALL PAY VICTIM RESTITUTION AS DETERMINED BY THE ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT,//VF4:300/PC/PSR/BKFEE/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/CITE/EMAT/1463ALC/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/X:PLEA FORM NUMBER PRU 101 IS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE ASTHOUGH FULLY SET FORTH HEREIN/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/CTORD:SCRAM REQUIREMENT IS TERMINATED/

/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/X:PLEA OPEN TO THE COURT OVER THE PEOPLE'S OBJECTION,/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:1, 2, AND 3/FNDG/X:DEFENDANT ADMITS PRIOR CONVICTIONS OF FEBRUARY 19,2008, VC 23152(A), A MISDEMEANOR; FEBRUARY 6, 2009, VC 23152(B), A MISDEMEANOR; AND NOVEMBER 12,2010, VC 23152(A), A MISDEMEANOR,/X:DEFENDANT ADMITSALLEGATIONS PURSUANT TO VC 23578 AND VC 23538(B)(2),/PRES:05-07-15/ARBUCKLE/TWS/CONTD:SENTENCING/DOP/

/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DEF:WAS PRESENT IN COURT WHEN THIS CASE WAS FIRST CALLED AND WAS EXCUSED TO ENTER RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM/DEF:WAS NOT PRESENT WHEN THIS CASE WAS RECALLED/DEF:HAS SUCCESSFULLY ENTERED OHLHOFF MEN'S RESIDENTIAL PROGRAM; HIS PERSONAL PRESENCE WAIVED FOR THE SECOND CALLING OF THE CASE/DAWT/OR/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOPU:COUNSEL, IFDEFENDANT IS IN PROGRAM,/
/CAL:SCRAM COMPLIANCE & TO SET/LDPX:12-15-14/X:SCRAM REPORT WAS POSITIVE//CONTD:FOR PREHEARING CONFERENCE ON 11-13-14/DOP/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 12-03-14/DOP/
/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW60/LDPX: 12-15-14/987,2/X:DEFENDANT TO REFERRED TO SCRAM/CONTD:SCRAMCOMPLIANCE & TO SET/DOP/
/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DAWT/CONT/DOPU:WAIVED BY COUNSEL WITH PROOF OF CONTINUED PROGRAM PARTICIPATION,/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:LAUREN SCHWEIZER IS SPECIALLY APPEARING ON BEHALF OF THE ATTORNEY OF RECORD/STWPX/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
